channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-11676] sanity-sec: test_20 failed with Error: 'test mapped_admin:60002:c0:0:000, wanted 1 1, got 0 0'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/bb02fce8-e9ab-11e8-815b-52540065bddc

CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=1
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=1
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=1
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=0
CMD: trevis-71vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
CMD: trevis-71vm2 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-71vm2 10.9.4.17, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=0
waited 3 seconds for sync
CMD: trevis-71vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_modify --name default --property trusted --value 0
CMD: trevis-71vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n nodemap.active
CMD: trevis-71vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
CMD: trevis-71vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap
On MGS 10.9.4.16, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=0
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=1
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=1
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=1
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=1
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=1
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=0
CMD: trevis-71vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
CMD: trevis-71vm2 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-71vm2 10.9.4.17, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=0
waited 5 seconds for sync
CMD: trevis-71vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_activate 0
CMD: trevis-71vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n nodemap.active
CMD: trevis-71vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
CMD: trevis-71vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param nodemap.active
On MGS 10.9.4.16, active = nodemap.active=0
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, active = nodemap.active=1
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, active = nodemap.active=1
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, active = nodemap.active=1
CMD: trevis-69vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-69vm8 10.9.6.254, active = nodemap.active=0
CMD: trevis-71vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
CMD: trevis-71vm2 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d @
On trevis-71vm2 10.9.4.17, active = nodemap.active=0
waited 3 seconds for sync
item.summary: sanity-sec: test_20 failed with Error: 'test mapped_admin:60002:c0:0:000, wanted 1 1, got 0 0'

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
